HomePage.title: Verk Group
HomePage.subheading: Global trade. Modern logistics. Strong brands.
HomePage.description1: We sell on the biggest marketplaces and develop our own brands, reaching customers internationally.
HomePage.description2: From warehousing to delivery — we handle the entire process.
HomePage.aboutSubheading: Building modern commerce based on data, logistics, and strong brands.
HomePage.aboutDescription1: Verk Group develops sales in the e-commerce model, focusing on quality service and customer trust. Our shop Verk.sklep.pl has been present on the market since 2019 and has received thousands of positive reviews, serving both retail customers and wholesale partners.
HomePage.aboutDescription2: We have thousands of verified reviews, with as much as 97% being positive ratings. We have been distinguished with, among others, the “Gold” badge and “I listen to my customers,” which confirms our approach to quality and service as well as long-term business cooperation.
HomePage.aboutDescription3: We fulfill orders in multiple product categories, ensuring efficient logistics and timely delivery as well as flexible cooperation conditions for wholesale customers.
HomePage.pros3: I Listen to My Customers -Gold Badge
HomePage.brandsSubheading: We create and develop brands tailored to the needs of the modern market.
HomePage.brandsDescription1: The Verk Group portfolio includes private labels that we develop based on market analysis and sales experience. Each of them responds to specific customer needs and is distributed in many European countries.
HomePage.contactSubheading: Have questions or want to start cooperation? Contact us.
HomePage.contactDescription: We are open to business cooperation, sales development, and new projects. Contact us to discuss cooperation opportunities.

AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.subheading: Market analysis. Offer development. Retail sales.  Wholesale. Logistics and distribution
AboutPage.description1: Verk Group is a company developing sales in the e-commerce and distribution model, combining retail and wholesale trade. Since 2019, we have been building our position on the market, developing sales through our own channels and cooperation with marketplace platforms.
AboutPage.description2: Our goal is to create a scalable sales model that combines the development of private labels, a wide assortment, and efficient logistics. We serve individual and business customers, delivering products in many categories — from electronics, through home and garden, to sports and hobbies.
AboutPage.howweworkDescription1: We operate based on an integrated sales model that includes product development, sales, and logistics. We use market experience and data analysis to effectively develop the offer and tailor it to customer needs.
AboutPage.howweworkDescription2: Our activity includes both retail sales through the online store and handling wholesale orders. This allows us to scale the business and reach different market segments.
AboutPage.wherewesaleDescription1: We carry out sales and deliveries to many European countries  including, among others, Poland, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, the Netherlands, the Czech Republic, Slovakia, and the Baltic countries.
AboutPage.wherewesaleDescription2: We are developing our international presence, constantly expanding the scope of activity and adapting the offer to the specifics of local markets.
AboutPage.trustandscaleDescription1: Our credibility is confirmed by customer reviews and long-term presence on the market. Since 2019, we have been developing sales, gaining the trust of thousands of customers.
AboutPage.trustandscaleDescription2: We have over 4500 reviews, with 97% being positive ratings. We have been distinguished with, among others, the “Gold” badge, “I listen to my customers,” and the “Dom 2025 – distinction” award.

ContactPage.title: Contact
ContactPage.subheading1: Have questions or want to start cooperation?
ContactPage.disclaimer1: We serve retail and business customers.
ContactPage.disclaimer2: Our team is available by phone and email on business days from 8:00 to 15:00.
ContactPage.privacyDescription1: The administrator of personal data is VERK GROUP SIKORSKI SP.K.
ContactPage.privacyDescription2: Details about data processing can be found in the Privacy Policy.

BrandsPage.title: Our Brands
BrandsPage.subheading: We create and develop brands tailored to the needs of the modern e-commerce market.
BrandsPage.description1: Each of our brands is created based on sales experience, market analysis, and customer needs in various segments.
BrandsPage.disclaimer1: The Verk Group portfolio includes private labels developed in various product categories.
BrandsPage.disclaimer2: Each of them has a separate identity while fitting into a consistent business model based on quality, availability, and scalability.
BrandsPage.Verkdescription1: The main brand developed within the wide product portfolio. It includes diverse categories — from electronics and accessories to everyday products.
BrandsPage.Verkdescription2: It focuses on availability, wide assortment, and tailoring to the needs of the e-commerce market.
BrandsPage.Divodescription1: A brand developed with modern lifestyle and online sales in mind.
BrandsPage.Divodescription2: It offers products in categories such as home and garden, sports and hobbies, and more, combining quality with attractive design.
BrandsPage.Opexdescription1: A brand focused on tools and equipment for home improvement and construction.
BrandsPage.Opexdescription2: It offers a wide range of products, from hand tools  to power tools, designed to meet the needs of both DIY enthusiasts and professionals.
BrandsPage.Przyjaciedescription1: A brand aimed at the segment of everyday products and lifestyle.
BrandsPage.Przyjaciedescription2: Created with the idea of a broad audience, combining functionality with an accessible design.
BrandsPage.brandsDevelopmentDescription1: We develop our brands based on market analysis, sales data, and observation of market trends.
BrandsPage.brandsDevelopmentDescription2: This allows us to effectively introduce and scale products across various market segments.

PrivacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicyPage.subheading: Protecting the personal data and privacy of our customers is a priority for us.
PrivacyPolicyPage.description1: This Privacy Policy describes what personal data we collect, how we use it, and what rights our customers have in connection with the processing of their data.
PrivacyPolicyPage.description2: We encourage you to read the content of the Privacy Policy to better understand how we care about the security and privacy of our customers.
PrivacyPolicyPage.generalDescription1: This Privacy Policy explains how personal data is processed and how cookies are used on the Verk Group website.
PrivacyPolicyPage.generalDescription2: The data controller is: VERK GROUP SIKORSKI SP.K. Wygody 16 05-090 Podolszyn Nowy, Poland NIP: 5342500808
PrivacyPolicyPage.rangeDescription1: This website is an informational website and does not collect personal data via forms.
PrivacyPolicyPage.rangeDescription2: Data may be processed in the following cases:
PrivacyPolicyPage.rangeList3: website usage (technical data such as IP address)
PrivacyPolicyPage.analyticsDescription1: The website uses Google Analytics to analyze traffic.
PrivacyPolicyPage.analyticsDescription2: Google Analytics uses cookies to collect anonymous information such as:
PrivacyPolicyPage.analyticsDescription3: This data is processed anonymously and used only for statistical purposes.
PrivacyPolicyPage.mapsDescription1: The website may use Google Maps to display company location.
PrivacyPolicyPage.mapsDescription2: Using the map may involve transferring data (e.g. IP address) to Google.
PrivacyPolicyPage.cookiesDescription2: Users can manage cookies through their browser settings.
PrivacyPolicyPage.changesDescription1: The controller reserves the right to change this Privacy Policy.
